title: ficus involuta
intro: Ficus involuta, also known as the curled fig or curled leaf fig, is a species of fig tree native to Africa and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ficus involuta include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ficus involuta is typically prepared as a decoction, infusion, or topical application, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
